introSection:
Light of Revenge is a steel launched roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Qixia, Nanjing, Jiangsu, China.

The ride is a near clone of Cheetah Hunt at Busch Gardens Tampa, however sections of it have been modified slightly compared to Cheetah Hunt. The ride includes theming provided by Beijing Xinyilian Engienering & Consulting Co. Ltd.
fullText:
Light of Revenge is a steel launched roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Qixia, Nanjing, Jiangsu, China.

The ride is a near clone of Cheetah Hunt at Busch Gardens Tampa, however sections of it have been modified slightly compared to Cheetah Hunt. The ride includes theming provided by Beijing Xinyilian Engienering & Consulting Co. Ltd.
